productDisplayName: Numero Uno Men Black Casual Shoes
description: Synthetic leather upper with suede overlays for durability and comfortPerforations on the sides for greater breathability Suede panel overlays on the toe counter and behind the heel for greater protection to the feel Panel detailing on the sides for greater style, lace-ups for a snug fitCushioned collar and tongue for greater comfort Textile lining for added comfort, brand tab on the side, appliqued on the tongue and printed behind collar EVA midsole for better shock absorption and all day comfort Durable rubber outsole in terraced wave pattern on the forefoot for maximum durability and traction Diamond pattern on the lateral side for extra grip, built up textured heel counter with small lug pattern for greater protection to the heel
